Author: DriftlessDigits
Name: Scrooge
Punchline: A gil saved is a gil earned.
Description: "You might say that everythin's for sale here in Ul'dah — as long as you've got the gil." — Momodi Modi
Changelog: Decision memory. Triage stops nagging: a held flag now remembers the market it was judged against, and re-holds against an unchanged world stay SILENT - no churn, no reset of the held-since clock. Your manual reprice counts as the standing answer; only genuinely new sales re-ask the question. Flags self-heal: when a run processes an item and the problem is gone, the flag closes itself - the inbox shows only live questions with honest ages. Cleans up flag debt from the lane rewrite, dedupes legacy duplicates, and logs every triage decision at Debug for the curious.
